summary: Iteration 73: Verified aurora speed reduction and preview snapshot implementation. All 20 backend tests passed. Aurora STATE_CONFIGS have correct reduced speeds (idle=0.06, listening=0.09, thinking=0.12, responding=0.16). Preview snapshot API endpoints (GET/PUT) are implemented and return proper 401 for unauthenticated requests. PreviewTab component correctly implements snapshot loading, saving, and clearing logic. Login page loads with smooth aurora animation and no console errors. Login authentication did not complete with test credentials (Supabase auth issue - not related to features being tested).

integration_issues.issue: Login with testprov@test.com / password123 did not redirect to dashboard - may be Supabase auth configuration issue or invalid credentials

action_items: Verify test credentials (testprov@test.com / password123) are valid in Supabase for this environment
